FSElevate
Overview Buttons Cards Forms Badges Gamification
Elevate
Theme overview

Elevate

A focused dark interface for professional fullstack learning products: serious engineering product energy with subtle XP, streak, quest, and mastery cues.

Usage

Use the Elevate theme as the base visual language for learning dashboards, component surfaces, progress systems, and high-signal course flows.

  • Import ../components/theme.css once per page.
  • Use the sidebar docs to compose production screens from small, reusable classes.
  • Keep gamification cues supportive: progress, mastery, rewards, and status.
Learning progress surface Preview + code

Build a rate-limited auth API

Practice sessions, token rotation, Redis-backed throttling, and production-ready error handling.

    <div class="progress-meta"><span>API Design Quest</span><span>78%</span></div>
    <div class="progress"><div class="progress-bar" style="width: 78%;"></div></div>
  </div>

Linear

Operational clarity

Dense, scannable layouts for builders who return every day.

Duolingo

Progress energy

Motivation signals stay visible without becoming childish.

Stripe

Premium surface
